code:
%% Circuit Breaker Pattern - Fault Tolerance %% Version: 1.0.0 %% Date: 2025-10-27 %% Description: Circuit breaker pattern for webhook delivery and external service calls stateDiagram-v2 [Logistics_DeliveryRoute] --> Closed: Initial State Closed --> Open: Failure Threshold Exceeded
(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Closed --> Closed: Successful Request
(Logistics_TrackingNumber) Closed --> Closed: Failed Request
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Open --> HalfOpen: Timeout Elapsed
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) Open --> Open: Request Attempted
(Logistics_TrackingNumber) HalfOpen --> Closed: Test Request Successful
(Logistics_Warehouse) HalfOpen --> Open: Test Request Failed
(Logistics_Warehouse) HalfOpen --> HalfOpen: Waiting for Test
(Logistics_DeliveryRoute) note right of Closed CLOSED STATE - All requests flow through - Monitor failure rate - Track response times - Increment error counter end note note right of Open OPEN STATE - Block all requests - Return cached response - Or return error immediately - Wait for timeout period - Log all blocked attempts end note note right of HalfOpen HALF-OPEN STATE - Allow test requests - Limited throughput - Monitor success rate - Quick transition decision end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为物流系统的webhook投递设计一个熔断器模式。核心场景是：当外部服务频繁超时或失败时，要快速失败避免级联故障。先定义三个核心状态：Closed、Open、HalfOpen。
理解。Closed是正常状态，所有请求都通过；Open是熔断状态，直接拒绝；HalfOpen是试探恢复。那初始状态应该是Closed对吧？还有，状态迁移的触发条件用什么来标识？
对，初始状态是Closed。触发条件我们结合物流实体来区分：用Logistics_TrackingNumber表示请求级别的指标，用Logistics_DeliveryRoute表示路由/时间维度的指标，用Logistics_Warehouse表示仓储服务层面的结果。
好的，我先画出主状态迁移：Closed到Open的迁移条件是"Failure Threshold Exceeded"，关联Logistics_TrackingNumber——意思是当追踪号层面的失败次数超标就熔断。Closed自身有两个循环：成功请求和失败请求都保持Closed，但分别关联TrackingNumber和DeliveryRoute。
Open状态的自循环也要加上——"Request Attempted"关联TrackingNumber，表示熔断期间如果有请求尝试，记录下来但不放行。然后Open要能进入HalfOpen，条件是"Timeout Elapsed"，关联DeliveryRoute，表示路由层面的超时等待结束。
已添加。HalfOpen的处理逻辑：测试成功就回到Closed，测试失败就回到Open，这两个都用Logistics_Warehouse关联，因为是仓储服务返回的实际结果。还有一个等待测试的自循环，关联DeliveryRoute。
等等，HalfOpen到Closed的标注应该是"Test Request Successful"，你写的是"Test Success"？需要精确一点。另外，三个状态右侧需要详细注释说明行为：Closed要监控失败率、递增错误计数器；Open要返回缓存或立即错误、记录被阻请求；HalfOpen要限制吞吐量、快速决策。

已修正HalfOpen到Closed的标注为"Test Request Successful"。三个状态的右侧注释已补充完整：Closed状态注释包含All requests flow through、Monitor failure rate、Increment error counter；Open状态包含Block all requests、Return cached response、Log all blocked attempts；HalfOpen状态包含Allow test requests、Limited throughput、Quick transition decision。
检查一遍：初始状态Closed，失败超标（TrackingNumber）进Open；Open超时（DeliveryRoute）后进HalfOpen；HalfOpen测试成功（Warehouse）回Closed，测试失败（Warehouse）回Open。所有状态都有自循环记录行为。注释也完整了。可以定稿。
